_help_1: Map logical names â†’ node IDs in your exported workflow. Run `python scripts/inspect_workflow.py workflows/ltx_2.3_v1.1.json` to list every node and its inputs.
_help_2: Two formats per logical name are supported: shorthand (just the node id string) uses a default input key per logical name; explicit form lets you specify a custom input key.
_help_3: Defaults: prompt_positiveâ†’text, prompt_negativeâ†’text, input_imageâ†’image, seedâ†’seed, output_filenameâ†’filename_prefix. Override the input key if your workflow uses something else (e.g. KSampler's `noise_seed`).
_help_4: prompt_negative is OPTIONAL. Remove it from this file if you want your workflow's hard-coded negative to win.
